title: caucalis heterocarpa
intro: Caucalis heterocarpa, also known as horned poppy or prickly poppy, is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Caucalis heterocarpa lie in its alkaloid compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Caucalis heterocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
